rule CDB_CyberThreatNlpIntelligenceSystem_exploit {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CyberThreat-Nlp-Intelligence-System exploit"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-10"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "CyberThreat" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
